channel.title: The Political Lens - Shorts
channel.description: Daily AI-powered political analysis shorts for TikTok and Instagram

item.title: Trump Ceasefire Shock: Congress Blindsided by Major Announcement
item.description:
Trump just announced a massive ceasefire deal—and lawmakers found out on social media. The political establishment is in total chaos as Democratic and Republican leaders scramble to respond.
Video: https://github.com/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline/releases/download/v20260409-1428/short_v20260409-1428.mp4
#politics #news #politicalnews #shorts

item.title: Trump's Iran War: How the Nuclear Deal Collapse Led to Conflict
item.description:
Did Trump's decision to withdraw from the Iran nuclear deal spark a direct military conflict? This analysis breaks down the strategic decisions and diplomatic breakdown that changed everything.
Video: https://github.com/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline/releases/download/v20260409-1259/short_v20260409-1259.mp4 Watch: https://youtube.com/shorts/9PiiTFfPUo0
#politics #news #politicalnews #shorts
